metadata.title: Leetgrind Development Plan
metadata.planning-principle: Define module contracts before implementation spreads.

module.name: Web App
module.purpose: Render the local user experience, routes, dashboards, forms, graph, editor, and streaming UI.

public-contract.provides: React application shell and screens.
Typed API calls through client adapters.
UI composition using packages/ui components.
public-contract.must-not: Directly access PGLite, Drizzle repositories, OpenAI, OpenRouter, or Codex-specific code.

module.name: Local API Server
module.purpose: Expose local Express and tRPC API, coordinate use cases, stream long-running operations.

public-contract.provides: Health endpoint.
tRPC router and application service endpoints.
Runtime composition for database, AI providers, agents, RAG, and code runner.
public-contract.must-not: Become the place where all domain rules are hidden.

module.name: Domain Model
module.purpose: Define pure product concepts and rules independent from frameworks and provider SDKs.

public-contract.provides: Goal, Skill, SkillEdge, Attempt, Evidence, Evaluation, ReviewSchedule, Recommendation contracts.
Domain state transitions and pure rules as the product matures.
public-contract.must-not: Import React, Express, Drizzle, PGLite, AI provider SDKs, or UI packages.

module.name: Local Persistence
module.purpose: Own PGLite client creation, Drizzle schema, migrations, repositories, and vector storage.

public-contract.provides: Database schema and typed persistence APIs.
Embedding storage through pgvector-compatible vector fields.
Repository functions that map rows to domain-safe shapes.
public-contract.must-not: Contain UI logic or provider-specific prompt logic.

module.name: AI Provider Layer
module.purpose: Hide OpenRouter, OpenAI API key, Codex subscription auth, and future local providers behind stable contracts.

public-contract.provides: AiProvider interface.
Model metadata and request/result contracts.
Provider adapters as they are implemented.

module.name: Agent Workflows
module.purpose: Implement mentor, interviewer, reviewer, planner, and recommender workflows using domain and AI abstractions.

public-contract.provides: Typed workflow inputs and structured outputs.
Agent run context contracts.
Traceable evaluation and recommendation workflows.
public-contract.must-not: Call provider-specific SDKs directly unless the exception is documented.

module.name: Retrieval And Memory
module.purpose: Own ingestion, chunking, embedding coordination, retrieval policy, and citation metadata.

public-contract.provides: Document chunking and retrieval contracts.
Content RAG and memory RAG boundaries.
Traceable context item outputs for agents.
public-contract.must-not: Store all memory as opaque chat history.

module.name: Code Runner
module.purpose: Run user solutions through language adapters, deterministic tests, and normalized result contracts.

public-contract.provides: SupportedLanguage, CodeRunRequest, CodeRunResult, and CodeRunner contracts.
Future adapters for JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, WebContainers, and Tauri-side execution.
public-contract.must-not: Run arbitrary code without sandboxing, timeout, and output capture.

module.name: Spaced Repetition
module.purpose: Schedule skill and learning-item reviews using SM-2-inspired rules.

public-contract.provides: ReviewState and scheduling functions.
Deterministic review planning that can be tested without AI.
public-contract.must-not: Depend on React, database adapters, or provider SDKs.

module.name: Shared UI
module.purpose: Provide reusable React UI primitives and app-specific components.

public-contract.provides: Button and future UI primitives.
Styling utility helpers.
public-contract.must-not: Contain product workflow state, persistence access, or AI provider calls.

module.name: Shared Contracts
module.purpose: Provide cross-package schemas, small utilities, and shared result contracts.

public-contract.provides: Shared Zod schemas and generic result types.
public-contract.must-not: Become a dumping ground for domain, UI, or provider-specific logic.

phase.name: Foundation And Governance
phase.goal: Create monorepo, baseline packages, GRACE governance, and successful build/typecheck.

phase.name: Local Data And API Backbone
phase.goal: Implement local persistence, repositories, application context, and typed API backbone.

phase.name: User Profile, Goals, And Onboarding
phase.goal: Let the user define profile, goals, initial skills, languages, and resume context.

phase.name: Progress Dashboard And Knowledge Graph
phase.goal: Show goal readiness, skill progress, weak spots, recommendations, recent activity, and skill graph.

phase.name: AI Providers, Agents, And RAG
phase.goal: Implement provider settings, at least one provider adapter, agent runtime contracts, document ingestion, and retrieval.

phase.name: Assessments, Lessons, And Recommendations
phase.goal: Create assessment sessions, AI evaluations, evidence extraction, lessons, and recommendation loop.

phase.name: Coding Practice IDE And Runner
phase.goal: Add coding tasks, CodeMirror editor, deterministic tests, hints, submissions, and AI review.

phase.name: Spaced Repetition, History, And Mock Interviews
phase.goal: Implement due reviews, progress history, mock interview sessions, and readiness reports.

phase.name: Desktop Readiness, Hardening, And Polish
phase.goal: Prepare Tauri path, data export/import, diagnostics, provider reliability, and safe code execution hardening.
